strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple production platforms (Optilyz, RIDE Capital, WatchUp), directly matching the core stack
Proven full-stack range from databases to UI, plus relevant infrastructure exposure (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes) aligned with the nice-to-haves
Berlin-based with strong craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and current AI/LLM agent infrastructure work matching bonus criteria
concerns: Seniority level far exceeds the entry/junior target of the role
PostgreSQL not explicitly listed — relational experience shown via MySQL/SQL rather than Postgres specifically
Nest.js not explicitly named in the resume, though Node.js backend depth is extensive

key_factors.factor: Full-stack breadth across DB, API, and UI layers

response.justification: The candidate brings a directly aligned TypeScript, React, and Node.js toolkit honed across Optilyz, RIDE Capital, and current work at re:cinq, plus genuine full-stack range covering relational databases, REST APIs, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes — exactly the architecture this platform demands. Craftsmanship habits (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture) match the team's stated interest in clean software design, and current AI-agent and MCP work hits the LLM nice-to-have squarely. Berlin location supports the on-site requirement, and the breadth of shipped products signals someone who can grow into progressively more responsibility quickly.
